1.3.1
Mooring & Load-out Plan — Flow Control Station (FCSM)

This sequence illustrates the transportation, mooring, load-out, and seafastening process of the Flow Control Station module using barge and SPMT.

Step 1
Mooring Arrangement

Barge is positioned alongside the jetty with a defined mooring plan and tug arrangement to ensure stability during load-out preparation.

▼
Step 2
Link Bridge Installation

Temporary link bridge is installed between jetty and barge to enable safe transfer of equipment.

▼
Step 3
SPMT Configuration

SPMT trailers are arranged with front and rear PPU to support the transportation of the FCSM module.

▼
Step 4
Positioning at Jetty

FCSM module is positioned at the jetty prior to load-out, aligned with the load-out path.

▼
Step 5
Load-out Operation

The module is transported from jetty to barge using SPMT along the defined load-out direction.

▼
Step 6
Seafastening

FCSM is secured on the barge using seafastening structures to ensure stability during marine transportation.

Transportation Route Bonny Island — Inland Transportation Routes
Aerial Map
NLNG Jetty → BNAG Site — Heavy Transport & Material Routes
Route Legend
BOGT Jetty → Laydown Area (General Material)
Bodo-Bonny Road → Laydown Area / BNAG
Laydown Area → BNAG Site
NLNG Jetty → BNAG Site (Heavy Equipment / Oversized Module)
Transportation route from NLNG Jetty to BNAG Site passes through BOGT facility via Road 16, with two 90° turns required for oversized module transport. Nigerian Partners manage inland logistics within the Bonny Island compound.
II. Installation Methodology and Lifting Strategy

Transportation & Overall Installation Sequences
NLNG Jetty → BNAG Platform Overall Installation Sequences 3D Animation
2.1
Lifting Sequences
The following 8-step lifting sequence illustrates the planned brownfield installation order on the BF platform. Each step shows the module or skid being lifted (highlighted), along with the prepared foundations for upcoming installations.
SEQ 1
(1a) Slug Catcher
(1b) Elec / Inst Room
SEQ 2
(2) Pipe Rack No.2
Foundation Flow Control Station Foundation
SEQ 3
(3) Flow Control Station
Foundation HP Separator Foundation
Foundation TEG Contactor Foundation
SEQ 4
(4a) TEG Contactor
(4b) HP Separator
Foundation Pipe Rack No.1 Foundation
SEQ 5
(5) Pipe Rack No.1
Foundation TEG Regeneration Foundation
SEQ 6
(6) TEG Regeneration
Foundation Metering Skid Foundation
SEQ 7
(7) Metering Skid
Foundation MRU Foundation
SEQ 8
(8) MRU
Module / Equipment being lifted in this sequence
Foundation prepared & ready for next installation
